title: Sunfur Edit - low
description: A very lite variant of the Sunfur Edit texturepack, tweaked to have no impact on performance and use less than 0.5mb of storage while still providing a fancy dark GUI, custom sun and moon and some texture tweaks.
body:
A vanilla-like texturepack featuring dark-mode and some small texture tweaks like slightly lower grass to make the game look more dynamic.

This is a special variant of the **Sunfur Edit** texturepack. It has no custom sky elements except the high-quality sun and moon, and doesn't provide any of the custom 3d models the full version does. It also doesn't require Optifine or similar mods. Use this version if you...
- experienced performance drops with the other versions
- don't want to "waste" storage space on texturepacks you might not use
- want the GUI and texture tweaks of "Sunfur Edit" but don't like the 3d models and/or custom sky

## [Available Sunfur Edit Variants](https://modrinth.com/collection/YYDST57h)
### Overview:
|**[Sunfur Edit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit):**|Custom Sky|Custom 3d Models|Fancy Dark UI|
|---------------------|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------|
| **[Sunfur Edit - low:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit-low)**|Only Sun & Moon|No custom models|Fancy Dark UI|
| **[Shader Friendly:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit-shader-friendly)**|No Custom Sky|Custom 3d Models|Fancy Dark UI|

The low version **doesn't require Optifine**. It's also strongly optimised for performance and file size.

Please note that **minecraft versions newer than 1.20.1 are not supported** and will cause some textures to behave differently as intended.
